text: The World Cup is more than a tournament. It's where legends are made.
Some people believe football is a matter of life and death. I assure you, it's much more serious than that.
author: Bill Shankly (placeholder)

text: When the World Cup begins, the world stops. For one month, only the ball matters.
Football is the ballet of the masses.
author: Dmitri Shostakovich (placeholder)

text: Every four years, hope wears a different shirt.
The greatest joy of football is sharing it with someone else.
